review_title: Challenging, meet new people with different needs
review_body_text: Everyday is a new day, new needs, new sales target. You learned every single day but with your friends, your co-workers beside you even the hardest part of the job like facing complains of system failure etc you still can smile and laugh together.

review_title: A good place to start career
review_body_text: The place where i started my career,i was given lots knowledges here ,the only drawback was salary was less ,difficult to survive in a big city with the given salary.
Focus on generating income for company and ecouragements are given to boost sales. People are friendly and helpful. KPI and incentives are based on sales figure.
It was a good experience working as an intern there in spite the slow progress on my work ID. The colleagues were nice and friendly although they are much elder than me.

review_title: Productive and fun with friendly seniors.
review_body_text: It was a good environment to working for the company. My seniors were guide me until I can worked with low supervision. My main function were sales and marketing. I was exposed to various backgrounds of citizens, either local or foreigner. It was good for me to develop my soft skills.

My favorite parts of my job included the ability to work independently (trust from employers) & the people I worked with. It’s great to work with people that care about their company and doing a good job. It’s hard to find that environment today because so many people just don’t care about honesty, hard work & integrity. Nice Boss.. Nice Friends.. Nice Environment.. Enjoy Working with My Team..
cons_text: I already expert doing my work

review_body_text: Keep focused on long term goals. Always look for ways for personal improvements. Resourceful. Strive for perfection and excellence

Sharing the benefits of investing in mutual funds with the public was fun. They happy with the investment returns & my colleagues helps me sharing too with my beloved clients when am not able doing presentations due on limited knowledge which that was when the first time I joining the company.
Despite bad time, management should work together and motivate to improve productivity which is lacking. Room for advancement is limited asmanagement do mot want yo take risk.
cons_text: Chance to explore different audits limited

review_title: A good place to gain experience
review_body_text: Dealing with a lot of people that has different characters and personalities made me learn a lot about my job. For example, the way I respond to this person may make him/her think I give a good service but the same technique would not work for another person. Thus, I have to constantly observe the customers and entertain to their enquires in the ways that would make them feel good about my service and make them feel they came to search for answers, they got their answers.

review_title: Good workplace with Internationally known Brand
review_body_text: Systematic and professional. Good career development with well planned training programme. Learned a lot of people manangement skills and team spirit. Provided good benefits like medical coverage for employee and family members. Epf and Socso contribution by employer.
pros_text: Medical coverage for staff and family members, Planned training program

review_body_text: Good benefit given by company and enjoy working environments with freelance. Free tripp. Two times bonus a year. 6 type of income given.
cons_text: Hard to sell products with the current market economy down

review_body_text: Good team work career enhancement.Resign due to continue further education so that working hour clash with college hours.Good management and friendly with no pressure
The company has a good working environment but there are still employees who take advantage of the situation. There is always a healthy competitive and able to discipline the working time.

CIMB helps me to improve my interpersonal skills and communication skills and helped to build a better career. I have to provide professional advice on appropriate financial products on customer needs and to ensure customer satisfaction and provide excellent after sales service.

review_title: It's a nice place to work with great teamwork
review_body_text: Overall I gained a lot of valuable experience throughout my 26 years of working under the same organisation. I get to know good colleagues where we create great teamwork to make the workplace a fun place to work.
Teamwork working environment, nice colleague helping each other. Learn multiple product from this bank. Hard to focus on sales as have to do multiple product.
cons_text: suffer to hit every product sales target.

review_body_text: The people in this bank are very friendly and helpful. They treat new employee with full of respect. The task given in this bank was very challenging and meaningful. It help me to gain more knowledge in banking fields and also gain a lot of new experience in this banking fields. Moreover, everyday they give different task with a target. The environment is with full of positive vibrant. They also provide transportation for their employees.
pros_text: free meals like breakfast lunch and tea time, gym

review_body_text: Challenging when attending to customer demand and at the same time cannot compromise the SOP. Managing subordinate with skill and tolerate to ensure day to day operation smoothly run and also to ensure non compromising of SOP. The hardest part of the job is to ensure all subordinate achieve their targeted KPI. The most enjoyable part when subordinates happy with their bonus.

So far I really enjoy being in this position. What I learnt so far is communication is very important since this job needs you to communicate well with customers to persuade them to make payment on time. The hardest part is achieving monthly target. Since this is team-work based, everybody needs to achieve their personal and also team target. So we will work together till the end of month to achieve targets. The most enjoyable part is the working environment. Everyone is very positive and working together like a big family.
cons_text: working 7 days at the end of month
